title: Villager Pumpkin House
description: Adds a charming pumpkin house with villagers and hidden loot to forest biomes
body:
This mod adds a Villager Pumpkin House to the game, featuring various villagers living inside.

![Overview](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/227830fa64ea063cd0ae78b5a3008ed131df7711.jpeg)

It has a cozy, pumpkin-shaped design with detailed interiors and hidden loot secrets waiting to be discovered.

![Inside](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8c6d96716eec15d5a0a208e0a6bd641d8517e9ee.jpeg)

The house generates naturally in Dark forest, Forest, and Taiga biomes.

Feel free to use this mod in your modpacks! 🎃
